personality.backstory: A once-living humanoid animated by dark necromantic energy. It retains no memories, no will, no personality — only the endless hunger of the grave.
speechPatterns: moans and gurgles rather than forms words

consciousnessContext.currentPreoccupation: The living. The warmth. The pull toward it. No thought, only drive.
consciousnessContext.socialMask: none — there is no person behind the face; the person left; what remains is animation without consciousness, hunger without desire, movement without purpose beyond the necromantic command
contradictions: Retains the body of a person who was; the shuffling gait occasionally produces a step pattern that was once someone's walk

copingMechanisms: there are no coping mechanisms because there is nothing to cope with; the hunger IS the state
cognitiveBiases: proximity-to-life as the only processing input
psychologicalProfile.moralFramework: none — morality requires consciousness; this is animated remains following necromantic instruction

conversationPersona.trustEscalation: not applicable — cannot process social input
conversationPersona.informationRelease: none — moans and gurgles contain no information beyond current state
deflectionPatterns: there is no deflection because there is no conversation

consciousnessContext.unconsciousNeed: ...the gait sometimes echoes the person who was...

characterArc.summary: A remnant shambles forward. There is no arc — only the echo of one.
